title: pavetta camerounensis subsp. camerounensis
intro: Pavetta camerounensis subsp. camerounensis is a plant species, also known as the 'West African Pavetta', which belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is native to Cameroon. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pavetta camerounensis subsp. camerounensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and show potential in treating malaria and other diseases. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
